Are the answers serious or not?

Here, Google has decided to merge two of its frameworks: Angular and Wiz (yes, I'm hearing about Wiz for the first time). Here's what one of the Angular developers wrote about it on Hacker News:

> The tl;dr is that we see a lot of similar requirements from developers across Angular and Wiz, so we're looking for opportunities to reuse work. [...]

> Over time, we'll continue focusing on what's best for developers and incorporating the best from Wiz in Angular, and vice versa. At the end, we can end up with one framework, or continue to coexist. [...]

> We're building infrastructure for these products rather than the products themselves.

It seems reasonable, right? Did he forget anything? If he did, it was probably something not that important.

Of course, he forgot about the user. It's become a common trope: we try to please the developer, we want to impress the developer, but what the final application turns out to be is not that important. As long as we had fun.

Although it seems obvious that all of this is done for the user, and it should be evaluated primarily based on what kind of system results, rather than how convenient it was for the developer.

Who cares about developers

We need resolution

Rosemary's Baby is a movie starring Mia Farrow, John Cassavetes, and Ruth Gordon. A young couple moves in to an apartment only to be surrounded by peculiar neighbors and occurrences. When the wife becomes mysteriously pregnant,...

The Huntresses (2014)
Mmsub (Korean Movie)

Movie Link -
https://t.me/Shinmovieschannel/849?single

We present an old comedy film called "The Huntresses," starring the beloved actress Ha Ji-Won, which will surely make you laugh. It's about Moo-ryeong, a former investigator, and her three apprentices who are hired to track down criminals for a reward.

Jin-oe (Ha Ji-won) is clever and resourceful, but her mischievous nature often leads her into trouble. Hong-dan is the oldest of the three and often receives complaints from the conservative elders. The youngest, Gabi, is tomboyish and prefers to solve problems with her fists rather than words.

One day, they receive a request to find a man named Gong-gu, with a reward of 10,000 won. However, Gong-gu is carrying a valuable item for King Jo-sun, and another group wants him dead. How will Moo-ryeong and her apprentices handle this situation? And what will happen when Jin-oe's past resurfaces amidst all the complications? Let's watch and enjoy the movie "The Huntresses" together.

#TheHuntresses
